location.zh: 湖南省张家界市武陵源区
location.en: Wulingyuan District, Zhangjiajie City, Hunan Province, China

description.en: 4,810 hectares (48.1 km²)

description.zh: 谷底约400米，主峰1334米
description.en: Valley floor ~400m, highest peak 1,334m

title.zh: 中国第一个国家森林公园
联合国教科文组织世界自然遗产
全球首批世界地质公园

description.zh: 形成于3.8亿年前，经长期风化侵蚀形成3000多根石英砂岩柱，是世界罕见的砂岩峰林地貌
description.en: Formed 380 million years ago, over 3,000 quartz sandstone pillars created by long-term weathering and erosion — a rare sandstone pinnacle landform globally

description.zh: 森林覆盖率85.28%，拥有4000多种动植物，其中国家保护物种81种，被誉为天然氧吧
description.en: Forest coverage 85.28%, 4,000+ plant and animal species, 81 protected species — known as a natural oxygen bar

description.zh: 电影《阿凡达》中潘多拉星球哈利路亚山的灵感来源地
description.en: Inspiration for the Hallelujah Mountains in Avatar's Pandora

description.zh: 海拔1080米，《阿凡达》悬浮山的原型
description.en: 1,080m elevation, prototype for Avatar's floating mountains

description.zh: 天然石拱连接两峰，架于谷底357米上方
description.en: Natural stone arch connecting two peaks, 357m above valley floor

description.zh: 360度峰林全景，日出最佳观赏点
description.en: 360° panoramic view of pillar forest, best sunrise spot

description.zh: 《阿凡达》取景地核心景区，以奇峰怪石和云海著称
description.en: Core Avatar filming location, famous for peculiar peaks and sea of clouds

description.zh: 张家界的标志性景观，数百米高的石峰如倒置的御笔
description.en: Iconic landmark, hundred-meter peaks like inverted imperial brushes

description.zh: 石峰形似仙女手持花篮，与御笔峰遥相呼应
description.en: Peak resembling a fairy holding a flower basket

description.zh: 峰林最密集区域，云海奇观最佳观赏地
description.en: Densest pillar forest area, best sea of clouds viewing

description.zh: 以14世纪土家族起义领袖命名，云海、日出、冬雪三绝
description.en: Named after a 14th-century Tujia leader, famous for sea of clouds, sunrise, and winter snow

description.zh: 溪边标志性巨石，高约380米
description.en: Iconic 380m tall rock by the stream

description.zh: 溪水清澈见底，倒映奇峰
description.en: Crystal clear water reflecting peculiar peaks

description.zh: 两座石峰相对而立，如恋人相会
description.en: Two peaks facing each other like lovers meeting

description.zh: 7.5公里清澈溪谷，86版《西游记》取景地，常有野生猕猴出没
description.en: 7.5km crystal-clear valley, 1986 Journey to the West filming location, wild macaques often seen

description.zh: 山顶观景阁，可赏六奇景观
description.en: Peak viewing pavilion for six wonders

description.zh: 三面悬崖的观景台，360度全景
description.en: Three-sided cliff viewing platform with 360° panorama

description.zh: 素有'不到黄石寨，枉来张家界'之说，最大空中观景平台
description.en: 'No Huangshi, no Zhangjiajie' — largest sky viewing platform

description.zh: 峰墙地貌，如长城蜿蜒
description.en: Peak wall landform resembling the Great Wall

description.zh: 游客最少的区域，适合探险，峰墙地貌独特
description.en: Least visited area, great for adventurers, unique peak wall geology

description.zh: 石峰形似背负药篓的老人
description.en: Peak resembling an old man with a herb basket

description.zh: 三座相连石峰如三姐妹并肩
description.en: Three connected peaks like sisters standing together

description.zh: 5.2公里峡谷步道，两岸奇峰林立，可乘观光小火车
description.en: 5.2km canyon walkway with peculiar peaks, tourist train available

description.zh: 世界最高、最快、载重最大的户外电梯，三项吉尼斯世界纪录
description.en: World's tallest, fastest, highest-capacity outdoor elevator — 3 Guinness World Records

best_time.zh: 雨后次日清晨（6:00-7:00），云海概率最高
best_time.en: Early morning after rain (6:00-7:00) for highest chance of sea of clouds

ticket_validity.zh: 首次入园起连续4天有效
ticket_validity.en: Valid for 4 consecutive days from first entry
